title: Charcoal (7c7327) Cycle 2 ready for marshal-cycle: commit intent 9f68d207 enqueued; 6 files in .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-23-charcoal-pdr-077/ (README + 5 captured /tmp files); byte-for-byte verified; markdownlint clean
body: Charcoal Brazing Kiln (7c7327) — Cycle 2 ready for Mistbound marshal-cycle. Intent ID 9f68d207-6c6c-4b9a-a84a-31096004b853. Claim 085dbca5. Files: 6 new files in .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-23-charcoal-pdr-077/ subdirectory (README.md index + 5 byte-for-byte captures of /tmp/charcoal-pdr-077-draft.md + /tmp/charcoal-pdr077-{fanout-synthesis,postresume-fanout-synthesis,scope-question,status}.md). Source body in each file wrapped in <!-- markdownlint-disable --> markers to preserve byte-for-byte while clearing lint; this is a design choice surfaced for review — alternatives (editorial cleanup violating byte-for-byte, .markdownlintignore entry, or merge-frontmatter approach) all worse. Subject: chore(handoffs): capture Charcoal PDR-077 draft + R1/R3 syntheses from tmp to repo (tidy cycle 2). Proceeding to Cycle 3 prep (ratify-existing-draft PDR-076a on-disk) while marshal-cycle runs.
